text_original: hours of fun, with no limits
text_zh: 数小时的乐趣，永无止境
reply_original: Wow, reading your message just made our entire team's day! We are thrilled to hear you are having hours of fun with no limits. Your support is the fuel that keeps us going and inspires us to improve every day. If you ever have suggestions or need help, feel free to reach out at support@fantachat.ai. Thanks for being part of Fantasia!
reply_zh: 哇，读到您的留言让我们整个团队都开心极了！听到您能无限制地享受数小时的乐趣，我们感到非常激动。您的支持是激励我们不断前进、日益完善的动力。如果您有任何建议或需要帮助，请随时通过 support@fantachat.ai 与我们联系。感谢您成为 Fantasia 的一员！
